Mobile.viewOtherPlans: Find a plan that's right for you.
Mobile.subscribeSuccessMessage: You have successfully subscribed to this plan. You will now see it on your dashboard.
Mobile.subscribeErrorMessage: Could not subscribe to this plan. You may already be subscribed.

LandingPage.heroSubtitle: Get daily diet plans tailored to your health needs. From diabetes management to child nutrition, Nevo is your guide to a healthier life.
LandingPage.featuresTitle: Everything You Need for a Healthier Diet
LandingPage.feature1Description: Choose from plans for diabetes, cardiac health, general wellness, and child nutrition, all created by experts.
LandingPage.feature2Description: Use the app in either Bangla or English for a comfortable and intuitive experience.
LandingPage.feature3Description: Never miss a meal with scheduled push notifications that keep you on track with your health goals.
LandingPage.footerDisclaimer: Disclaimer: Nevo provides nutritional suggestions and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult with a doctor or registered dietitian.
